prompts.prompt:
Corporate-blue digital service ad aesthetic for Siigo, Colombia's #1 cloud invoicing platform. Background: clean white or very light blue-grey (#F5F8FF), with optional deep navy (#0A1628) dark-panel sections. Primary color #005FCC used on buttons, text highlights, and UI chrome. Accent green #00C781 for positive metrics and checkmarks. Typography: bold geometric sans-serif headlines in white or dark navy; sub-copy in regular weight; all-caps CTA badges. Composition: laptop or smartphone mockup showing Siigo's clean invoice creation UI — white card interface with blue accents — floating on gradient background. LATAM professional subject in background if lifestyle element included. Mood: empowered confidence, modern simplicity. Soft card shadows; rounded corners 8–12px. No heavy shadows or grungy textures.

Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact brand colors, typography style, and UI design precisely. Create: a static ad with a clean white background. Top third: large bold sans-serif headline reading "Factura en 30 segundos. DIAN incluido." Below in smaller text: "Siigo es el software de facturación electrónica #1 en Colombia, autorizado por la DIAN." Bottom half: a laptop displaying the Siigo invoice creation dashboard at a slight angle — showing the clean white card UI with blue accents, client selector field, product line items, auto-filled IVA tax row, and the blue "Generar factura" button — soft studio lighting with subtle shadow beneath the device. Siigo logo bottom right. Clean, authoritative, tech-forward. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Headline copy can be tested in A/B: alt version — "30 segundos. Cero rechazos del DIAN."

Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand colors and typography style. Create: a promotional ad with a split background. Top 60% is #005FCC and bottom 40% is #F5F8FF. Center: three floating plan cards arranged in an overlapping fan — each a white rounded-rectangle with subtle shadow showing plan name, price, and 3–4 key features. The PRO card is slightly larger and has a #00C781 "MÁS POPULAR" badge. Upper area: large white sans-serif reading "EMPIEZA GRATIS — ESCALA CUANDO QUIERAS". Below: "Sin tarjeta de crédito. Cancela cuando quieras." Behind the plan cards, subtly visible: a blurred Siigo invoice creation screenshot showing the actual interface. Siigo logo bottom right. 9:16 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Plan cards: Gratis (0 COP, 5 docs), 120 Docs ($22.493/mes), PRO ($57.068/mes, ilimitado — featured).
